description: Product Description JeeJaan Grey Mailing Bags 10 x 14" - (254 x 356 mm) Introducing JeeJaan 10” x 14” Grey Postage Bags – a reliable and eco-frendly solution for confidently sending lightweight parcels. Manufactured using premium-quality 50–55 micron material, they’re tough, waterproof, tear-resistant, and 100% recyclable. These parcel bags are designed to suit all your needs. Each grey plastic mailing bag includes a secure self-seal adhesive strip, allowing quick and efficient packing. The 10 x 14 size makes it suitable for posting clothing items, accessories, documents, and more. These grey plastic postage bags are commonly used for platforms like Vinted and are essential to any home or business mailing setup. Specs Colour: Grey Thickness: 50-55 Micron Size: 10 x 14 Inches Size: 254 x 356 Millimeter Material: Plastic Features: Strong Adhesive Seal Each JeeJaan grey mailing bag is designed with a high-strength self-sealing adhesive strip that tightly secures your parcels without the need for additional tape. Once sealed, the bag stays shut, making it ideal for grey postage bags for clothes, Vinted, eBay, Etsy, or other parcel shipments. Tamper-Proof Design Our grey parcel bags are fully tamper-evident, ensuring that any attempt to open the package is clearly visible. This gives both the sender and the recipient confidence that the contents remain untouched during delivery. A trusted choice in grey postal bags for secure online selling and shipping. Strong & Heavy Duty Quality Manufactured using tough 50–55 micron LDPE material, these grey shipping bags provide exceptional resistance against tears, punctures, and rough handling. They are a reliable option for sellers in need of plastic mailing bags that offer both strength and durability for Small and lightweight items. Waterproof Protection The waterproof outer layer of these plastic postage bags ensures complete protection from rain, splashes, and environmental moisture. Your products stay clean and dry in transit, making these grey mailer bags an excellent choice for sending clothes, documents, or accessories safely. Usage: Secure E-commerce Shipping: Grey mailing bags are widely used by e-commerce sellers to ship products safely and securely. Whether you're selling clothing, electronics, or accessories, these strong and waterproof bags provide reliable protection during transit. Perfect for Parcel Deliveries: These parcel bags are perfect for postage, offering a strong adhesive seal that keeps items secure. They are commonly used for delivery services, ensuring that parcels arrive intact and in good condition, even in harsh weather conditions. Ideal for Clothing and Apparel Packaging: Grey mailing bags are often the go-to choice for shipping clothes, especially on platforms like Vinted or eBay. The temper-proof and heavy-duty nature of these bags protects items from damage and ensures that clothing reaches customers in pristine condition. Versatile Personal and Business Use: In addition to business use, these plastic mailing bags are also suitable for personal purposes like storing items or sending gifts. The strong and waterproof qualities make them a great choice for any situation requiring secure packaging. Why Choose JeeJaan Grey Mailing Bags?
